title: ProjectLifecycleOperatorDecisionPath
description: Reserved broker-owned typed operator-decision path projection for future setup and project-lifecycle prompts. This object is explicitly non-authoritative and exists so dashboard/UX prompt surfaces remain presentation layers over broker-owned posture/mutation contracts.

path_state.description: Reservation state indicating this path is intentionally predeclared for future interactive UX use.

decision_authority.description: Authority model for operator decisions; clients are not authorities.

surface_role.description: Prompt-surface role for future UX channels.

non_authoritative_surface.description: True because prompts are presentation-only and must not become a second authority surface.

posture_contract_schema_ids.description: Broker-owned typed posture contracts that remain authoritative for future prompt rendering.

mutation_contract_schema_ids.description: Broker-owned typed mutation contracts that remain authoritative for setup/lifecycle apply decisions.

shared_approval_trigger_registry_namespa.description: Shared approval-trigger namespace reused for project lifecycle decisions when policy requires approval.

shared_hard_floor_registry_namespace.description: Shared hard-floor namespace reused for high-risk project lifecycle apply decisions.

high_risk_apply_approval_model.description: High-risk lifecycle apply steps reuse shared approval and hard-floor model; no setup-only approval lane.
